name: Chile Head Chicken Fingers
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Cornmeal, whole-grain, yellow, stone ground
1 cup Col. Hogan's Chick'n Dippin' Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the silver skin from the chicken tenders and place them in a deep bowl.
2. Add Harissa sauce and buttermilk to cover the chicken. Let marinate for 1 hour, shaking off excess liquid.
3. Shake off any excess cornmeal.
4. Dredge the chicken in cornmeal until evenly coated.
5. Fry the chicken in oil heated to 350°F (175°C) until golden brown and crispy.
6. Serve with Col. Hogan's Chick'n Dippin' Sauce on the side.
